calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Continued To Jun-02-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial Date And All Pre-Trial Deadlines
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Non-Party Compliance With Records Subpoena And/Or To Compel Plaintiff To Execute An Authorization To Release Medical Records
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT 275 10TH STREET ASSOCIATION, LP's Motion To Compel Non-Party Compliance With Records Subpoena And/Or To Compel Plaintiff To Execute An Authorization To Release Medical Records.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted in part; denied in part. The motion to compel Plaintiff to sign a release of medical records at SFGH is granted. Plaintiff shall provide such signature and authorization within 5 days. The motion to compel SFGH to provide documents is denied as the motion was not served on the SFGH.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Set For Trial On Jul-29-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
